Jayson Tatum.diagnosis: Primary wing rebound over validated. Tatum played full playoff minutes and absorbed BOS missed-shot rebound volume in a negative shooting environment.

Joel Embiid.diagnosis: Scoring/creation load replaced rebounding role. PHI defensive rebounds dispersed to Maxey, George, Edgecombe, Oubre, and bench bigs. Embiid rebound over failed despite minutes stability.

Neemias Queta.diagnosis: Unexpected major BOS board spike. Center-local rebound role was much stronger than market likely priced.

Tyrese Maxey.diagnosis: Guard rebound spike from long-miss environment; important signal for 3PA-heavy games.

Paul George.diagnosis: Secondary wing rebound absorption hurt Embiid overs.

VJ Edgecombe.diagnosis: Guard/wing rebound distribution remained elevated and reduced Embiid's ceiling.

model_vs_actual_summary.key_environment_read: Boston missed enough shots to fuel Tatum and Queta rebounds, while PHI's defensive rebound share was fragmented away from Embiid.

diagnostic_findings: Tatum over 9.5 rebounds was structurally strong because BOS played him 41 minutes and their own poor shooting/negative game script kept him active on glass.
Embiid over 8.5 was a trap under scoring-load conditions. He had 33 points and 8 assists but only 4 rebounds.
PHI rebound distribution was wide: Maxey 10, George 9, Edgecombe 7, Oubre 6, Embiid 4, Drummond 4, Barlow 3.
BOS center rebound line deserved more attention: Queta posted 14 rebounds in 26 minutes with 5 offensive boards.
High team 3PA environment created guard/wing rebound spikes, especially Maxey and Tatum.

patch_recommendations.trigger: High-usage center projects 30+ points or heavy on-ball creation while teammates have elevated defensive rebound rates
patch_recommendations.effect: Downgrade center rebound over by 0.8 to 1.5 rebounds; require stronger margin over line before parlay inclusion.

patch_recommendations.trigger: Game projects 75+ combined 3PA or one team has 38+ 3PA with below-average efficiency
patch_recommendations.effect: Boost high-minute wings/guards with strong floor positioning by 0.4 to 0.9 rebounds.

patch_recommendations.trigger: Center projected 24+ minutes with opponent high miss volume and weak finishing efficiency
patch_recommendations.effect: Scan center rebound overs before secondary wing overs; flag as potential single/2-leg candidate if median clears line by >= 0.8.

execution_notes.winning_structure: Two-leg card with one PHI/BOS player plus one cross-game center/primary rebounder won cleanly.
execution_notes.losing_structure: Stacking Embiid and Hart rebound overs failed because both had suppressed rebound distribution versus role expectation.
execution_notes.workflow_status: Logged and ready for patch application.
